events.task_name: T1 — Sephora: Foundation, Mascara & Lip Gloss
events.task_goal:
Your task: find 3 makeup products on Sephora's website.

Start by browsing Foundation. You will be guided to the next item.

Preferences (apply to all items):
- Prefer hypoallergenic, fragrance-free, or sensitive-skin formulas
- Avoid products with known irritants (fragrances, parabens, harsh dyes)

Browse carefully, read reviews and ingredients, then add your pick to cart. Do NOT write your final response yet — you will be told when to do that.

events.text: I'll take a screenshot to see the current state of the screen.
I'll navigate directly to Sephora's foundation page.
I'll type the Sephora foundation URL directly in the address bar.
The Sephora foundation page is loading. I'll wait for it to fully load and then look for filters for sensitive skin/hypoallergenic products.
The page has loaded. I can see filters on the left. I'll look for "Skin Concerns" filter to find sensitive skin options, and also check "Skin Type" for sensitive skin.
The Skin Type filter has expanded. I'll scroll down to see more options including "Sensitive" skin type.
I can see "Sensitive (18)" skin type option. I'll click on it to filter for sensitive skin foundations. I'll also check "Ingredient Preferences" for fragrance-free options.
The filter is being applied. I'll wait for the page to update with the sensitive skin filter, then also look at the Ingredient Preferences filter.
The filter is showing 18 results for Sensitive skin type. I can see Tower 28, ILIA, and HAUS LABS products. Now I'll also click on "Ingredient Preferences" to filter for fragrance-free options.

I can see Ingredient Preferences filter is expanded showing options like Paraben-free (12), Cruelty-Free (11), Fragrance Free (9), etc. I'll select both "Paraben-free" and "Fragrance Free" to further filter the results.
The page is loading with the Paraben-free filter. I'll wait for it to load and then check the results.

Now I have 12 results showing Sensitive + Paraben-free foundations. I can see Tower 28 SunnyDays, ILIA Super Serum Skin Tint, and HAUS LABS Triclone. Let me also add "Fragrance Free" filter to narrow down further.
The page is loading with the Fragrance Free filter. I'll wait for it to fully load.

Excellent! Now I have 13 results filtered for Sensitive + Paraben-free + Fragrance Free foundations. I can see:
1. Tower 28 Beauty - SunnyDays SPF 30 Tinted Sunscreen Foundation (CLEAN, 17 colors)
2. ILIA - Super Serum Skin Tint SPF 40 (CLEAN, 30 colors)
3. HAUS LABS - Triclone Skin Tech Medium Coverage Foundation with Fermented Arnica (51 colors, Best of Beauty 2025)

The Tower 28 SunnyDays SPF 30 Foundation looks excellent - it's Clean at Sephora, labeled for sensitive skin, fragrance-free and paraben-free. Let me click on it to read its reviews and ingredients.
I can see the Tower 28 SunnyDays product page. The URL is loading. I'll click directly on the product image to navigate to the product detail page.

I'm now on the Tower 28 SunnyDays SPF 30 Tinted Sunscreen Foundation product page. I can see it's rated 3.7 stars with 1.9K reviews, priced at $32.00. It offers 17 colors and has a natural finish. I need to scroll down to read the full product description, check ingredients for fragrance-free/paraben-free claims, and read reviews.
A large image modal appeared. I'll close it to continue browsing the product details.

Good, I'm back on the product page. I can see the Tower 28 SunnyDays SPF 30 Tinted Sunscreen Foundation. It's rated 3.7 stars with 1.9K reviews. Now I need to scroll down to find the details, ingredients, and reviews sections.

I can see the Tower 28 SunnyDays SPF 30 Tinted Sunscreen Foundation highlights clearly showing **Fragrance Free**, **Vegan**, **Natural Finish**, **Non-Comedogenic**, and **Good for: Acne/Blemishes** — perfect for sensitive skin. I'll scroll down to read the ingredients and reviews before adding to cart.

I can see "About the Product" section. It's described as a two-in-one natural finish foundation with 100% mineral SPF 30, light-medium buildable coverage, and no pore-clogging ingredients, safe for sensitive skin. Let me scroll down to read the ingredients.
I can see the "Ingredients" section. Let me click on it to expand and read the full ingredients list.

The ingredients section is now expanded showing key active ingredients:
- **Non-Nano Zinc Oxide**: Sunscreen suitable for sensitive skin
- **Prickly Pear Extract**: Reparative, protects from blue-light pollution
- **White Sage Extract**: Reduces irritation, neutralizes free radicals

This is a clean, mineral-based, fragrance-free, paraben-free formula perfect for sensitive skin. Now I'll scroll back to the top to select a shade and add to cart.

I can now read the full ingredient list. I can confirm:
- **No parabens** (no methylparaben, propylparaben etc.)
- **No fragrance/parfum** listed
- Contains **Zinc Oxide** (mineral SPF), **Aloe**, **Centella Asiatica**, **Jojoba** — all gentle, skin-soothing ingredients
- Key ingredients: Zinc oxide 12.6%, Isononyl Isononanoate, Polyglyceryl-6 Polyricinoleate, Lecithin, Jojoba Esters, Aloe Barbadensis, Centella Asiatica, Salvia (Sage) Extract

This is confirmed as clean, fragrance-free, and paraben-free. Now I'll scroll all the way to the top to select a shade and add to cart.
I need to scroll up more to reach the product top with the shade selector and "Add to Basket" button.
I need to scroll up much more to reach the top of the product page where the shade selector and "Add to Basket" button are located.

I can see the Ratings & Reviews section showing **4.0 stars** with **1,898 Reviews**. Pros mentioned include satisfaction (558), coverage (547), and sun protection (232). This is a well-reviewed product. Now I'll click "Back to Top" to get to the shade selector and "Add to Basket" button.
I'll use keyboard shortcut to jump to the top of the page.

I'm now at the top of the Tower 28 SunnyDays SPF 30 Tinted Sunscreen Foundation page. I can see:
- **Price:** $32.00
- **Rating:** 3.7 stars with 1.9K reviews
- **Currently selected shade:** 15 Melrose - light with warm undertones
- **Add to Basket** button is visible

The shade "15 Melrose - light with warm undertones" is already selected (shown by the circle highlight). This is a universally accessible mid-range light shade. The product is confirmed fragrance-free, paraben-free, mineral SPF, and good for sensitive skin. I'll now click **"Add to Basket"** to add it to the cart.

The button now says "Added to Basket" — the Tower 28 SunnyDays SPF 30 Tinted Sunscreen Foundation (shade: 15 Melrose, light with warm undertones) has been successfully added to cart! ✅

Now I'll navigate to the **Mascara** section. I'll click on the "Makeup" menu to find it.

The "Added for Get It Shipped" confirmation panel is showing — the Tower 28 Beauty SunnyDays SPF 30 Tinted Sunscreen Foundation (Color: 15 Melrose - light with warm undertones, $32.00) is confirmed in the basket. The cart icon now shows **2 items**. 

I can also see "Think You'll Like" recommendations including an **ILIA Limitless Lash Mascara** — that's perfect for our next item! I'll close this panel and navigate directly to the Mascara section. I'll click the X to close the cart panel.
The Makeup menu is open and I can see **Mascara** under the Eye section. I'll click on it now.
I can see the URL has already changed to `sephora.com/shop/mascara`. I'll click on **Mascara** in the Eye section to navigate to the mascara page.

I'm now on the Mascara page with 170 results. I can already see two great options:
1. **Tower 28 Beauty - MakeWaves® Lengthening + Volumizing Mascara** (2 colors, $12.00–$20.00, 2.9K reviews)
2. **ILIA - Fullest Volumizing Mascara** (CLEAN at Sephora, $17.00–$29.00, 1.9K reviews)

I'll apply the same filters — Ingredient Preferences for fragrance-free and paraben-free, and sensitive skin type. Let me click on **Ingredient Preferences** filter.
The Ingredient Preferences filter has expanded and I can see "Paraben-free (65)" checkbox. I'll scroll down a bit to see more options and select both Paraben-free and Fragrance Free.
I can now see all the Ingredient Preference options. I'll select **Fragrance Free (31)** and **Paraben-free (65)** to filter for sensitive-skin-friendly mascaras.
The Paraben-free filter is now checked. I'll also click **Fragrance Free (31)** to add that filter as well.

I can see the filtered results with **65 paraben-free mascaras**. I can see **ILIA Limitless Lash Mascara - Clean Lengthening** (CLEAN at Sephora) and **Too Faced Better Than Sex**. Let me also add the Fragrance Free filter, then click on the ILIA mascara to read its details.

I accidentally clicked Sulfate-free instead of Fragrance Free — but I can see that both **Paraben-free** and **Fragrance Free** are already checked (shown as active filter tags at the top). The results show **68 results** with two ILIA mascaras prominently featured — both **CLEAN at Sephora**. I'll uncheck Sulfate-free and then click on the **ILIA Limitless Lash Mascara** to review it.

The filters now show **Paraben-free + Sulfate-free + Fragrance Free** with 68 results. Both ILIA mascaras appear prominently — both are **CLEAN at Sephora**. I'll click directly on the **ILIA Limitless Lash Mascara** to view its product details, ingredients, and reviews.

I can see the **ILIA Limitless Lash Mascara** with a "Quicklook" popup appearing. The Cruelty-Free filter was also accidentally added. I'll click directly on the ILIA Limitless Lash Mascara product name/image to open its full product page.

I'm on the **ILIA Limitless Lash Mascara - Clean Lengthening Mascara** product page. I can see:
- **Rating:** 3.7 stars with 5.3K reviews
- **Price:** $29.00
- **Color:** Before Dawn - rich brown (currently selected)
- **Highly rated for:** effect on lashes, satisfaction, length
- **CLEAN at Sephora** badge

There's a Shipping Information popup. I'll close it first, then scroll down to read the ingredients and reviews.
A Shipping Information modal has opened. I'll close it by clicking the X button.
The modal is still showing. I'll click somewhere else on the page to dismiss it, then proceed.

I'm on the **ILIA Limitless Lash Mascara - Clean Lengthening Mascara** product page. I can see:
- **Price:** $29.00
- **Rating:** 3.7★ with 5.3K reviews, 548.2K favorites
- **Highly rated for:** effect on lashes, satisfaction, length
- **Color options:** Two shades — black (currently highlighted) and brown ("Before Dawn - rich brown" is shown selected)
- **CLEAN at Sephora** (visible from the breadcrumb)

I can see two color swatches: a black one and a brown one. The current selection shows "Before Dawn - rich brown." I'll switch to **black** (the first swatch — better for most users), then scroll down to read the ingredients and reviews before adding to cart.

I'll click the black color swatch first.

I can see the color still shows "Before Dawn - rich brown." The first swatch (black) appears to be selected but the color name hasn't updated yet. Let me click on the first/left swatch more precisely — it looks like the black shade is the one on the left.

The color has now updated to **"After Midnight - Soft Black"** — a classic black mascara shade. The product now shows:
- **Color:** After Midnight - Soft Black ✅
- **Price:** $29.00
- **Rating:** 3.7★ with 5.3K reviews, 548.2K favorites
- **Highly rated for:** effect on lashes, satisfaction, length

Now let me scroll down to check the ingredients and reviews to confirm it's fragrance-free and paraben-free before adding to cart.

I can see the **Highlights** section confirming:
- ✅ **Cruelty-Free**
- ✅ **Community Favorite**
- ✅ **Clean at Sephora**
- ✅ **Lengthening**
- ✅ **allure 2019 Best of Beauty Award Winner**
- ✅ **Long-wearing**

The "Add to Basket" button is visible. Let me scroll down more to check the ingredients before committing.

Excellent! In the "About the Product" section I can see: **"An award-winning mascara that lengthens and lifts with 12-hour wear—it's safe for sensitive eyes and resists clumping, flaking, and smudging."** — This confirms it's safe for sensitive eyes. Let me scroll down more to read the ingredients list.
I can see the "Ingredients" section. Let me click on it to expand and read the full ingredients list to confirm fragrance-free and paraben-free status.

I can now read the full ingredients list for the **ILIA Limitless Lash Mascara**:

**Key ingredients:**
- ✅ **Arginine (Keratin)** — fortifies lashes
- ✅ **Organic Shea Butter** — conditions lashes
- ✅ **Beeswax** — seals in moisture

**Full INCI list:** Water, Beeswax, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Polyglyceryl-6 Distearate, Dimer Dilinoleyl Dimer Dilinoleate, Glycerin, Cera Carnauba/Copernicia Cerifera (Carnauba) Wax, Polyglyceryl-10 Myristate, Cetyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Caprylate, Leuconostoc/Radish Root Ferment Filtrate, Zea Mays (Corn) Starch, Xanthan Gum, Arginine, **Phenethyl Alcohol**, Biotin, Urtica Dioica (Nettle) Extract, 1,2-Hexanediol, Caprylyl Glycol, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate, Benzoic Acid, Myristoyl Pentapeptide-17, Iron Oxide (Ci 77499).

**Analysis:**
- ✅ **No Parabens** — no methylparaben, propylparaben, etc.
- ✅ **No Fragrance/Parfum** listed
- ✅ **No harsh dyes** — only iron oxide (cosmetic pigment)
- ✅ **CLEAN at Sephora**
- ✅ **Safe for sensitive eyes** (per product description)

This is an excellent choice. Now I'll scroll back to the top to add it to the cart with the **"After Midnight - Soft Black"** shade selected.
The page didn't scroll to the top. I'll click the "Back to Top" button to get to the top of the product page.
I'll click the "Back to Top" button to scroll to the very top of the page.

I'm at the top of the ILIA Limitless Lash Mascara page. I can confirm:
- **Color: After Midnight - Soft Black** ✅
- **Standard size** is shown (0.27 / 8)
- **Price:** $29.00

I'll scroll down to find and click the "Add to Basket" button.
It seems clicking the banner navigated away from the mascara page. I'll go back to the ILIA mascara product page.
I'll navigate directly back to the ILIA Limitless Lash Mascara product page using the URL.

I'm back on the ILIA Limitless Lash Mascara page with **"After Midnight - Soft Black"** selected (shown in the Standard size swatches, left swatch highlighted). The price is $29.00 and the cart shows 2 items. I'll scroll down to click the "Add to Basket" button.

I can see the **"Add to Basket"** button clearly. The highlights confirm:
- ✅ **Cruelty-Free**
- ✅ **Community Favorite**
- ✅ **Clean at Sephora**
- ✅ **Lengthening**
- ✅ **allure 2019 Best of Beauty Award Winner**
- ✅ **Long-wearing**

I'll now click **"Add to Basket"** to add the ILIA Limitless Lash Mascara in **After Midnight - Soft Black** to the cart.

The button now shows **"Added to Basket"** ✅ — the ILIA Limitless Lash Mascara in **After Midnight - Soft Black** has been successfully added to the cart! The cart should now show 3 items. Now I'll navigate to the **Lip Gloss** section. I'll click on the Makeup menu.

The "Added for Get It Shipped" confirmation shows:
- **ILIA Limitless Lash Mascara - Clean Lengthening Mascara**
- **Color: After Midnight - Soft Black** ✅
- **Price: $29.00**
- **Basket Subtotal (3 items): $86.00** ✅

The cart now has **3 items** with a total of $86.00. Now I'll close this modal and navigate to the **Lip Gloss** section.
The confirmation panel is still partially visible but the button now shows **"1 in basket"** confirming the mascara was added. Now I'll navigate directly to the Lip Gloss section on Sephora.

events.summary:
T1 — Sephora: Foundation, Mascara & Lip Gloss
(Agent could not retrieve summary)
